title: Jaipur, Rajasthan — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Jaipur, Rajasthan: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Jaipur is a city in Rajasthan with a population of 4,050,000. The Pink City and capital of Rajasthan, famous for its stunning palaces, vibrant bazaars, and rich Rajput heritage and architecture.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
